subject: Register claude-tools plugin in marketplace.json
description:
Add the `agent-alchemy-claude-tools` entry to `claude/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`.

Entry to add to the `plugins` array:
```json
{
  "name": "agent-alchemy-claude-tools",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "description": "Reference skills for Claude Code Tasks and Agent Teams features",
  "source": "./claude-tools",
  "homepage": "https://github.com/sequenzia/agent-alchemy/tree/main/claude/claude-tools",
  "repository": "https://github.com/sequenzia/agent-alchemy/tree/main/claude/claude-tools",
  "license": "MIT"
}
```

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] New entry added to marketplace.json plugins array
- [ ] Name follows convention: `agent-alchemy-claude-tools`
- [ ] Version set to `0.1.0`
- [ ] Source path `./claude-tools` resolves correctly relative to marketplace.json location
- [ ] Homepage and repository URLs are valid

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] JSON remains valid after adding entry (no trailing commas, correct structure)
- [ ] Entry position follows alphabetical ordering if other entries are ordered

_Error Handling:_
- [ ] Existing entries not modified

**Testing Requirements:**
• Verification: marketplace.json is valid JSON after edit
• Verification: Source path resolves to the plugin directory

Source: internal/specs/claude-tools-plugin-SPEC.md Section 5.3 (US-008), Section 13.4
